zh.Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾可洛素藍德 希爾
zh.Raskelf, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾拉斯可爾福
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Crossland於1484年出生在英國波藍德紐比時，他的父親John Gilbert Crossland28歲，母親Prudence Bolton29歲。他和Lady Agnes Baker至少有1個女兒。他去世於大約1569年在英國越可爾可洛素藍德 希爾享年86歲，埋葬在英國越可爾吉可波頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Crossland于1484年出生在英国波藍德紐比时，他的父亲John Gilbert Crossland28岁，母亲Prudence Bolton29岁。他和Lady Agnes Baker至少有1个女儿。他去世于大约1569年在英国越可爾可洛素藍德 希爾享年86岁，埋葬在英国越可爾吉可波頓。

nameMeanings.name: Crossland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in the parish of Almondbury, Yorkshire, named Crosland, from Old English cros ‘cross’ + land ‘newly cultivated land’.

variants.name: Croslin
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Crossland  .

variants.name: Crosslin
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Crossland  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When John Crossland was born in 1484, in Newby, Cumberland, England, his father, John Gilbert Crossland, was 28 and his mother, Prudence Bolton, was 29. He had at least 1 daughter with Lady Agnes Baker. He died about 1569, in Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 86, and was buried in Kirkburton, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Crossland est né en 1484, à Newby, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, John Gilbert Crossland, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Prudence Bolton, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Lady Agnes Baker. Il est décédé environ 1569, à Crossland Hill, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Kirkburton, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Crossland 1484 in Newby, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Gilbert Crossland 28 und seine Mutter Prudence Bolton 29. Er hatte mit Lady Agnes Baker mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1569 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Kirkburton, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Crossland è nato il nel 1484 nel Newby, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, John Gilbert Crossland, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Prudence Bolton, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Lady Agnes Baker. Morì circa 1569, nel Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Kirkburton, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Crosslandが1484年にイギリスクウンバーランドニュービーで生まれた時，父John Gilbert Crosslandは28歳，母Prudence Boltonは29歳であった。彼はLady Agnes Bakerとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1569年にイギリスヨークシュアイアクロスランド ヒルで86歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアキルクブルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Crossland(이)가 1484년 영국 c벌랜드 뉴비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Gilbert Crossland(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Prudence Bolton(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Lady Agnes Baker(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1569년 영국 요르크실르 크로슬랜드 힐에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 커k버턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Crossland nasceu em 1484, em Newby, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Gilbert Crossland, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Prudence Bolton, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Lady Agnes Baker. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1569, em Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Kirkburton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Crossland родился в 1484 г. в местности нюби, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени John Gilbert Crossland было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Prudence Bolton, 29. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Lady Agnes Baker. Он умер около 1569 г. в местности кроссланд хилл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности киркбуртон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Crossland nació en 1484, en Newby, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, John Gilbert Crossland, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Prudence Bolton, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Lady Agnes Baker. Murió aproximadamente 1569, en Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Kirkburton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
